markdown:
# What I'm doing now

  I live in London, work at [WINNOW](http://winnowsolutions.com/), and **try to focus on these things:**

  (in order of time spent)
- working full time as senior product manager for [WINNOW](http://winnowsolutions.com/): cutting food waste in half by helping restaurants cook smarter
- making a lovely home in SE London with my partner
- failing again at learning Python (where does time go?!) while trying to use data science as the vehicle
- after recently winning a long battle against shoulder pain, were drawn into skirmishes with lower back pain which recently developed to all out war: slipped disc is the diagnosis
- due to the above annoying health setback taken up swimming as my main form of exercise for the next six months, aiming to get back to regular and pain free [CrossFit](http://crossfitlondonuk.com/) training
- also doing, when back allows:
- fitness boxing at [1Rebel](http://www.1rebel.co.uk/)
- bare bow archery at [archeryfit](http://archeryfit.com/)
- the (very occasional...) bouldering at [the biscuit factory in Bermondsey](http://www.archclimbingwall.com/)
- reading [good books](https://www.goodreads.com/review/list/3011094?order=d&shelf=currently-reading&sort=date_added&visible_control=batchEdit)
- pondering the future

  For a more detailed view of what I have been up to recently, see my profile at [Gyroscope](https://gyrosco.pe/manne/).

  (list last updated: May 2017| credit for the /now idea: [Derek Sivers](https://sivers.org/nowff))
